hook: Tone often decides whether a hard conversation becomes intimacy or damage.
body: The same concern can land very differently depending on whether your delivery feels contemptuous, sharp, or steady.

hook: Men focused only on being technically right often ignore how their delivery makes the other person shut down.
body: How you say the truth shapes whether the truth can actually be heard.

hook: How you say the truth shapes whether the truth can actually be heard.
body: A direct concern spoken with calmness and respect can deepen trust more than a sarcastic version of the same point.

hook: A direct concern spoken with calmness and respect can deepen trust more than a sarcastic version of the same point.
body: Lower your sharpness before you raise the seriousness of the topic.
